message: Ugh, it's rough. These exams are going to be the death of me.
I feel you. Which subject are you struggling with the most?
Definitely chemistry. I can't seem to remember all these formulas.
Want to study together? Maybe we can help each other out.
That would be great. Two heads are better than one, right?
Exactly. Let's meet up after school in the library.
Sounds like a plan. Thanks for the help!
